description: Science fiction creatures — aliens, synthetic life, and entities from beyond the stars.
creatures: Xenomorph
A jet-black alien predator with acid for blood, an eyeless skull, and a parasitic lifecycle that hijacks hosts.
Martian
A thin, large-eyed being from the red wastes, inscrutable and eerily silent.
Blob
An ever-growing alien mass that absorbs everything it engulfs and oozes through the smallest gaps.
Shapeshifter
An alien horror that copies its victims so perfectly no one knows until it's too late.
Star Whale
A colossal, barnacled creature that drifts between stars, singing in frequencies that bend space.
Void Crawler
A shadowy entity from deep space that skitters through the gaps between dimensions, trailing madness.
Nano Swarm
A shimmering haze of microscopic machines that devours or rebuilds anything in its path.
Symbiote
A living alien skin that fuses with its host, amplifying strength while slowly consuming its will.
Hologram
A flickering, translucent figure of pure light, alive with artificial thought and unstable, glitching memory.
Slime
A gelatinous, self-aware organism that oozes through cracks and dissolves organic matter on contact.
Gremlin
A cackling little saboteur that nests in wiring and chews through circuits with gleeful destruction.
